chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 204 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.618/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.619/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 15.10.2024 None has appeared on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is furnished. Perusal of prayer clause reflects that the detenue is allegedly detained by her father. The custody of alleged detenue Mst. Farzana with her father being natural guardian does not come in definition of illegal confinement. The instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. However, the petitioner has the alternate remedy to file a Suit for conjugal rights before the Court having jurisdiction. Judge ARBROHI
